channel.title: Health - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Cyclospora, the ‘Explosive Diarrhea’ Parasite, Cases Reported in at Least 31 States: See the Map - TODAY.com

  4. Nearly 7,000 cases of cyclosporiasis confirmed or under investigation nationwide, CDC says  NBC News
  5. Ohio Woman Was ‘Camped Out in the Bathroom’ for Weeks with Cyclosporiasis  People.com

item.title: Cancer rates are expected to nearly double in the next 24 years - New York Post
item.description:
1. Cancer rates are expected to nearly double in the next 24 years  New York Post

item.title: Constipation May Be More Than a Simple Digestion Problem, Scientists Say - ScienceAlert
item.description:
1. Constipation May Be More Than a Simple Digestion Problem, Scientists Say  ScienceAlert
  2. Chronic Constipation May Begin When Gut Bacteria Disrupt the Intestinal Nervous System  Discover Magazine
  3. The gut and brain are in constant two-way communication — and scientists now see many cases of chronic constipation as a disorder of that signalling, not simply a problem of digestion  Space Daily
  4. Chronic constipation may be caused by interactions between the enteric nervous system and the gut microbiota.  GIGAZINE
  5. Why the gut behaves as your second brain  The Times of India

item.description:
